title: Worshop with Rosie
description: This workshop will be hosted by Rosie and will cover the basic of Unreal engine. It will be held in person and will be open to all students. The workshop will cover the basics of Unreal engine, including how to create a project, how to use the editor, and how to create a simple game.

title: Shrekathon
description: Hosted by Concordia Game Dev Club, Shrekathon is a 48-hour event GameJam.
